summary: AdminCMS refactoring verification complete. All 20+ section components work correctly. The original monolithic AdminCMS.jsx (5081 lines) has been successfully split into ~20 smaller components in /app/frontend/src/components/admin/. AdminCMS.jsx is now a thin router (~138 lines). All sidebar navigation, section rendering, and quick actions work as expected.

issues: Console warning: Empty string passed to src attribute for some offer images - should use null or placeholder instead

critical_code_review_comments: AdminCMS.jsx refactoring successful - reduced from 5081 lines to ~138 lines
All 20 section components properly imported and rendered based on activeSection state
Sidebar navigation with data-testid attributes works correctly for all groups and items
Single-item groups (Dashboard, Communauté) correctly navigate directly without expand/collapse
context_for_next_testing_agent: AdminCMS refactoring verified. All 20 section components work: DashboardSection, OffersSection, UniversitiesSection, ScholarshipsSection, UsersSection, AgentsSection, ApplicationsSection, HousingSection, MessagesSection, ChatsSection, ContactsSection, NewsletterSection, BlogSection, BannersSection, TestimonialsSection, FaqSection, CommunitySection, PaymentSettingsSection, TermsSection. Sidebar groups: dashboard (single), programs (offers, universities, scholarships), management (users, agents, applications, housing), communication (messages, chats, contacts, newsletter), content (blog, banners, testimonials, faqs), social/community (single), settings (payment-settings, terms-conditions).

admin_login.test: Admin login via /api/auth/login and localStorage token storage

dashboard_stats_cards.test: Dashboard shows 4 stats cards (Utilisateurs, Offres actives, Candidatures, Messages)

dashboard_quick_actions.test: Dashboard shows 4 quick actions (Nouvelle offre, Nouvelle université, Voir candidatures, Voir messages)

quick_action_navigation.test: Clicking 'Voir candidatures' navigates to Applications section

sidebar_single_item_groups.test: Single-item groups (Dashboard, Communauté) navigate directly without expand

offers_section.test: Offres section loads with offer list and 'Nouvelle offre' button

universities_section.test: Universités section loads with university grid (17 cards)

agents_section.test: Agents section loads with agent list

messages_section.test: Messages section loads with message list and conversation panel
